title: Entitlements
subtitle: Grant or revoke app access for one or more users at once.

picker.searchPlaceholder: Search users by name or email...

matrix.title: App access
matrix.subtitle: Toggle app access per user, then save.
matrix.insufficientRoleTooltip: This user lacks the required role.

empty.title: No apps found
empty.description: There are no apps to manage yet.

actions.roleRequiredTooltip: Some selected users lack the required role.

revoke.title: Revoke access to {appName}?
revoke.description: All {count} selected users will lose access to {appName} immediately. You can grant it again later.

emptyUser.title: No users selected
emptyUser.description: Search and select one or more users above to manage their app access.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

announce.granted: Granted access to {appName} for {count} selected users.
announce.revoked: Revoked access to {appName} from {count} selected users.
